environment.network_policy: Network used for installation only; Stanza inference set download_method=None, but transport was not externally blocked.

measurement_method.behavior: Each adapter processed cases.json in manifest order and emitted raw half-open character spans.
measurement_method.footprint: Logical byte sizes of regular files, excluding symlinks, under each isolated environment's site-packages; external Stanza model files are added separately.
measurement_method.derived: Exact token-list and sentence-list matches, expected lemma probe hits, and exact spelling-flag matches.
measurement_method.repeatability: A second warm run of every candidate produced byte-identical raw JSON. This does not establish cross-platform bitwise determinism.

candidates.name: CPython standard library baseline
candidates.python_availability: Built into tested CPython 3.12.13; the project policy also targets CPython 3.13 and 3.14.
candidates.platform_availability: Follows CPython and has no native or model asset.
candidates.operational_complexity: Low: no install, model download, native ABI, cache, or background service.
limitations: The transparent baseline is experiment-only, not production segmentation.
It has no general morphology or spelling support.
Its abbreviation list is deliberately bounded and failed the initial case.

sentences.text: Prof. Kowalski mieszka przy ul. Długiej.
Małe koty spały na miękkiej kanapie.
Mam zamek, a zamek stoi na wzgórzu.

candidates.name: Standard-library baseline plus Morfeusz2
candidates.python_availability: PyPI declares no Requires-Python value. The cp310-abi3 wheel ran on CPython 3.12.13; 3.13 and 3.14 were not executed.
candidates.platform_availability: 1.99.15 publishes macOS universal2, manylinux_2_28 x86_64, and Windows amd64 wheels; no sdist or Linux arm64 wheel was present in the queried release.
candidates.operational_complexity: Medium: one native wheel embeds linguistic data; no runtime download or service was observed.
limitations: Morfeusz2 does not supply sentence segmentation, so this strategy retains the experimental baseline.
Unknown-form detection is only a spelling suspicion signal, not a correction API.
Wheel coverage does not cover every platform in ADR-0001 and Requires-Python is undeclared.

candidates.name: spaCy with pl_core_news_sm

install_footprint.included: all regular files under site-packages, including model and explicit click repair

candidates.python_availability: spaCy metadata requires Python >=3.9,<3.15; the stack ran on CPython 3.12.13.
candidates.platform_availability: spaCy 3.8.14 publishes platform wheels including tested macOS arm64; model 3.8.0 is a universal Python wheel.
candidates.operational_complexity: Medium-high: 45 installed distributions after an explicit repair, compiled wheels, and a separately versioned model wheel.
limitations: The Polish model release says GNU GPL 3.0 but does not state the exact SPDX -only or -or-later form; either form is outside ADR-0001's default allowlist.
A clean uv resolution imported no click package and spaCy failed at import; click 8.4.2 was explicitly added for the behavioral run.
The documented pipeline components include no spelling checker.

candidates.name: Stanza Polish default_fast pipeline

components.morphology: PDB no-charlm POS and lemma models with conll17 pretrain

install_footprint.included: 623458856 bytes under site-packages plus 133877288 bytes in the model directory

candidates.python_availability: Stanza metadata requires Python >=3.9; the full closure ran on CPython 3.12.13.
candidates.platform_availability: Stanza is a py3-none-any wheel, but its PyTorch dependency and downloaded models determine actual platform support.
candidates.operational_complexity: High: 35 distributions including PyTorch, five Polish model files plus resources metadata, and an explicit offline model directory.
limitations: Stanza states language packs are ODC-By-1.0 to the extent Stanford owns the rights; that license is outside ADR-0001's default allowlist.
Inference used download_method=None, but the host network was not externally disabled.
The documented processor list includes no spelling checker.
